text.title: Serverless Architecture Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-serverless-architecture-patterns.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.

Forbidden traits: adr_id pattern violation; invocation_class enum violation; empty chosen_pattern; empty rejected; cost_break_even_rps <1; iac_template not in enum; review_trigger empty; version + date malformed.
